visa.note: Currently on a Graduate Visa (Subclass 485) expiring 27 April 2026. I will be applying for an extension which will provide an additional 4 years of work rights in Australia.

work_experience.title: Financial Business Analyst
work_experience.description: Built a rolling FY27-29 budget and forecasting model for a $2B gas storage and compression company. Developed a contract-driven revenue and valuation scenario engine (FY26-52) with VBA. Re-based corporate valuation model using FY actuals and CPI escalations for board-level analysis.

work_experience.title: Project Finance & FP&A Analyst
work_experience.description: Supported EOM, budget performance tracking, variance analysis, and monthly forecasting for Victoria's $70B+ infrastructure portfolio using EcoSys and Oracle. Processed $700M+ in journal entries and reconciled $2B+ between GL and sub-ledgers. Designed Power BI dashboards for project analytics.

work_experience.title: Financial Forensics Analyst, Treasury & Capital Markets
work_experience.description: Applied Excel/VBA and Python to perform time-series, variance, and regression analyses on superannuation portfolios. Conducted scenario modelling, VaR simulations, and stress testing in R Studio. Performed due diligence on corporate actions including M&A and capital reconstructions.

work_experience.title: Accountant
work_experience.description: Managed A/R and A/P processing, nationwide financial reporting, and tax compliance in SAP across commercial, retail, and federal contracts. Reduced month-end close cycle time by 10%.

work_experience.title: Financial Advisory & Client Engagement Intern
work_experience.description: Utilised Xplan for scenario-based asset allocation modelling and portfolio rebalancing. Generated Review of Advice documents for 40+ clients. Conducted due diligence on investment reports and liaised with superannuation and insurance providers.

certifications: Financial Planning & Wealth Management Professional (FPWMP) – CFI Institute
Financial Modeling & Valuation Analyst (FMVA) – CFI Institute
